title: Outbrief — AGPL-3.0 publication path + federal on-ramp
thesis: The demo artifacts are AGPL-3.0-publishable atop Apache-2.0 surfaces; federal on-ramps are CDAO Agent Network, DIU CSO, AFWERX 26.1.
script: AGPL-3.0 publishable artifacts (Lean module + console) consume only Apache-2.0 surfaces. Hand the room the cosigned tarball of the deliverable kit.
cli: pandoc PITCH_DECK_outbrief.md -o outbrief.pdf && cosign sign-blob --key cosign.key outbrief.pdf > outbrief.pdf.sig
fallback: Show the pre-cosigned kit tarball + its .sig.
